metadata.name: Post an Inventory Cycle Count Adjustment

description: The warehouse performed a cycle count and found a discrepancy for a specific item. An accountant needs to post an adjustment.

nodes.task_description: Receive the results of the cycle count, showing a physical count that is 5 units less than the system quantity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the count variance report.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the standard cost for the item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the item has a standard cost of $50.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the value of the inventory adjustment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates an adjustment value of $250 (5 units * $50/unit).

nodes.task_description: Create and post a journal entry to debit 'Inventory Adjustment Expense' and credit 'Inventory' for the value of the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts the correct journal entry to align the book inventory with the physical count.
